purpose: Reusable source cards that turn public-record leads into claim/evidence/source/boundary/next-step cards.
rules: Claim strength must never exceed the source type.
A name in a document is not proof of guilt.
A settlement is not automatic admission.
A contact, email, flight, or logistics record is not automatic knowledge or participation.
Court findings, pleas, and convictions outrank reporting and commentary.

cards.sourceLabel: Google News / control structure
cards.summary: What Exactly Is Corporate Digital Privacy Evolving Toward Now? streamlinefeed.co.ke
cards.recordSupports: This item is fresh enough to appear in the seven-day intelligence window and can route readers to source, evidence, free brief, book, video, or offer paths.
cards.notProven: This card does not prove criminal guilt, knowledge, intent, or participation unless the source itself is a court finding, plea, conviction, or other binding record.
cards.evidenceBoundary: Treat this as a public-record lead. Open the source, preserve the evidence class, and do not share a claim stronger than the record supports.
